title: Kimberley, Northern Cape — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Kimberley, Northern Cape: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Kimberley is a city in Northern Cape with a population of 225,000. The Diamond City, famous for the Big Hole and its central role in South Africa’s diamond rush history.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
